stemHtml: An occlusion is called a warm occlusion when the cold air...

options.a: at the rear of the occlusion is colder than the cold air ahead, with the warm air at a higher altitude.
options.b: at the rear of the occlusion is less cold than the cold air ahead, with the warm air at a higher altitude.
options.c: ahead of the surface position of the occlusion is only at a higher altitude.
options.d: at the rear of the occlusion is colder than the cold air ahead.
